name: agentic-sdlc-codex-plugin
description: A Codex plugin for project contextualization, verified assessments, and traceable software delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Project context and verified assessments for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agentic SDLC helps Codex understand an existing software project, agree a focused assessment in plain language, produce the requested artifact in its real format, verify it, and retain a traceable project record for later work.
defaultPrompt: Contextualize this project and prepare an initial technical assessment.
Assess this project's architecture, risks, and priorities.
Prepare a functional assessment for this project.
